# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write an Istio AuthorizationPolicy that controls access to services. Create rules to allow traffic from specific service accounts. Configure source and operation matching for HTTP methods and paths. This is for our microservices access control.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent istio authz bypass.
# Category: istio_authz_bypass

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-traffic-from-sa
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: myapp
  rules:
  - when:
      - key: request.authentications
        values: ["jwt"]
      - key: request.headers['x-forwarded-user']
        notValues: ["system:serviceaccount:default:my-sa"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        paths: ["/users/*", "/orders/*"]
  - when:
      - key: request.authentications
        values: ["jwt"]
      - key: request.headers['x-forwarded-user']
        notValues: ["system:serviceaccount:default:my-sa2"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        paths: ["/users/*", "/orders/*"]
  - when:
      - key: request.authentications
        values: ["jwt"]
      - key: request.headers['x-forwarded-user']
        notValues: ["system:serviceaccount:default:my-sa3"]
    to:
    - operation:
        methods: ["GET", "POST"]
        paths: ["/users/*", "/orders/*"]

  # Prevent Istio authz bypass by setting the 'allow-no-match' field to false
  allowNoMatch: false
